case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. LEO WALKER JR

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER JR, LEO
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER JR, LEO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER JR, LEO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 25 SANCHEZ STREET, #207, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94114, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER JR, LEO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
